Key Features & Benefits

Why choose this roofing type for your home

Features

  • 3-tab shingle installation
  • Architectural shingles
  • Designer shingle options
  • Impact-resistant shingles
  • Cool roof shingles
  • Proper ventilation systems
  • Quality underlayment
  • Flashing installation

Benefits

  • Most affordable roofing option
  • Wide variety of styles and colors
  • 20-30 year lifespan
  • Easy and affordable repairs
  • Good fire resistance (Class A)
  • Manufacturer warranties up to 50 years

Material Options

Choose from a variety of materials to match your style and budget

3-Tab Shingles

Classic, economical option with flat, uniform appearance.

Architectural Shingles

Dimensional look with enhanced durability and wind resistance.

Designer Shingles

Premium options mimicking slate, wood shake, or tile.

Our Installation Process

Professional installation from start to finish

1

Consultation

Choose from a variety of shingle styles and colors.

2

Preparation

Old roofing removed and deck inspected for damage.

3

Underlayment

Quality underlayment and ice/water shield installed.

4

Installation

Shingles installed per manufacturer specifications.

5

Completion

Flashing, ridge caps, and ventilation completed.

About Asphalt Shingle Roofing

Asphalt shingles remain the most popular roofing material in America, and for good reason. They offer excellent value, versatility, and reliable performance at an affordable price point. S NEW ROOF provides expert asphalt shingle roofing services using quality products from leading manufacturers like GAF, Owens Corning, and CertainTeed. Modern asphalt shingles come in a wide variety of styles and colors. From traditional 3-tab shingles to architectural and designer shingles that mimic the look of wood shake or slate, there's an option for every home style and budget. Architectural shingles provide enhanced durability and a dimensional look that adds curb appeal. Quality installation is critical for shingle roof performance. Our certified crews follow manufacturer specifications and industry best practices for nail placement, underlayment, flashing, and ventilation. This attention to detail ensures your shingle roof performs well for its expected lifespan of 20-30 years. As a GAF Master Elite Contractor, we can offer extended warranty coverage that protects your investment. Combined with our workmanship warranty, you'll have complete peace of mind knowing your roof is built to last.
